Tashjian, Chairman Jessica Cardon Richard Carratu Cynthia Dul Alex Snyder Chad Buch, Alternate Ian Rasmussen , Alternate Brett Dockwell, Alternate You may contact the Zoning Board of Appeals by e-mailing our Town Planner/Sr. Enforcement Officer @ sarah.carey@newcanaanct.gov Please do not send the Zoning Board of Appeals an e-mail regarding a pending application. MEETINGS The Zoning Board of Appeals meets on the first Monday of each month. The normal starting time for the meeting is 7:00 p.m. The meetings are held in the Board Room on the 2nd floor of Town Hall. ** Incomplete applications will not be scheduled for public hearing until complete. * Meeting may be cancelled depending on Agenda. ## Organizational meeting. If meeting minutes or agendas do not appear on this Web site, please contact the relevant board, commission or committee. Do not contact the webmaster of this site. For the Zoning Board of Appeals, please contact our Town Planner/Sr. Enforcement Officer @ sarah.carey@newcanaanct.gov
